texto: Understanding is used too often as a convenient means to avoid and sidestep the process of acknowledging the hurts and wounds (which makes forgiving more effective). We cannot truly forgive until we admit that the offense is as wounding as it really is, and therefore really does need to be forgiven. When understanding becomes the substitute not only for forgiving but for sharing about feelings, healing does not occur.
explicacao: Citação de Charles Finck sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Understanding is used too often as a convenient means to avoid and sidestep the process of acknow…” articula reflexao, forgiveness, forgiving em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como forgiving e healing.
